message:
feat(cli): assignee defaults, stats overhaul, and output improvements

- Default --assignee flag to current actor when no value provided
- Convert ReadyIssue and StaleIssue structs to use owned String values
- Overhaul stats command with git activity integration and richer output
- Improve agent file detection with better error reporting in agents command
- Fix search output formatting and doctor command diagnostics
- Add e2e tests for ready command assignee filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
